title: Client Names — EXL L&A Client Master List
grain: one row per EXL L&A client name
summary: Master reference list of the 26 L&A client names used throughout the workbook. Useful as the canonical roster of EXL's L&A clients and for validating/joining client names across the other sheets.
use_cases: Which companies are EXL's L&A clients?
How many L&A clients does EXL have?
Is a given company an EXL L&A client?

not_answerable.q: Revenue, products or processes for each client
not_answerable.reason: this is a name-only reference list; see the process, product and revenue sheets
